form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 0.8 len at Flemington G3 Ottawa March 7 over 1000m defeating Jadzia carrying 56kg at $1.80. The race before that favourite; won by 3.5 len at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw February 22 over 1100m defeating Big Wigs with 56kg at $3.60. Recent trial winner here who must be kept safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 0.8 len at Flemington G3 Ottawa March 7 over 1000m defeating Jadzia carrying 56kg at $1.80. The race before that favourite; won by 3.5 len at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw February 22 over 1100m defeating Big Wigs with 56kg at $3.60. Recent trial winner here who must be kept safe.

form.formComment: Yet to taste defeat in two starts. When well in the market on debut, was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.5 len at Warwick Farm 2yo F Mdn March 11 over 1000m in soft going defeating Aryaam carrying 58kg at $5. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 3 len at Flemington G3 Tbred Breeders March 28 over 1200m in heavy going defeating Salann with 56kg at $4.20. Exciting filly who keeps raising the bar, hard to hold out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Most recently sat on the pace when 2nd of 8 at Rosehill in the G3 Magicnight on March 14 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Pembrey with 56.5kg at $10. The start before that second last of 8 at this track in the G2 Sw Embrace on February 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Spicy Miss with 56.5kg at $10. Sticky draw and place prospects look best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 800m, laid out whilst over racing.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Returns off a 42 day letup. Resuming 7th of 16 at this track in the LR Millennium on February 7 over 1100m, 2.5 len behind Fireball carrying 54.5kg at $13. Last start 2nd of 8 at this track in the G2 Sw Embrace on February 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; neck behind Spicy Miss carrying 56.5kg at $15. Finally drawn a low gate and shapes as the main danger.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover from the 700m.

form.formComment: Since last run she has trialed at Warwick Farm over 821m on 30/3/2026; Last run 4th of 8 at Rosehill in the G3 Magicnight on March 14 over 1200m, 3 len behind Pembrey with 56.5kg at $8. Run before sixth of 8 at this track in the G2 Sw Embrace February 28 over 1200m, soft track; 2 len behind Spicy Miss with 56.5kg at $7.50. Kept fresh and can sneak into the minor money.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped on the hindquarter by Yvonne's Joy.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 42 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; came from midfield and won by 1.0 len at Eagle Farm 2yo F-Qlty February 28 over 1000m in soft going defeating Esperanza with 58.5kg at $1.95. The start before that favourite; scored a big 6 len win at Eagle Farm 2yo Mdn-Sw February 4 over 1000m defeating High Authority with 56kg at $1.55. Going well. Up sharply in class for this.

form.formComment: At the latest run crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 4th of 13 at this track in the G1 Sires Prod on April 4 over 1400m, slow going 4.5 len behind Campione D'italia carrying 54.5kg at $18. The start before that won by 2.75 len at Wyong 2yo Hcp March 18 over 1350m on a soft track defeating Tiger Turf carrying 56.5kg at $1.50. Happy to risk again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Last start came from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Randwick Kensington 2yo F Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Reachin' Out carrying 57.5kg at $1.90. The race before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 3 len at Warwick Farm 2yo 0Sc March 4 over 1100m on a rain affected track defeating Promenade with 54.5kg at $3.10. Goes to a new level here.
